title: Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You’ve spent months creating a course that could change lives, but here’s the cold truth: platforms like Teachable and Gumroad won’t let you sell it. Why? Because you’re in Nigeria, and PayPal or Stripe won’t touch your country. Your audience is global, but your payment options are locked behind geographic walls. You’re not alone—thousands of creators in restricted countries face this daily. The good news? There’s a way out. Crypto-native infrastructure bypasses these blocks entirely. No PayPal, no Stripe, no KYC hoops. Just direct payments from anywhere in the world. This isn’t a workaround; it’s a permanent solution. Let’s break down what nobody tells you about selling courses without the big platforms—and how to make your first sale without them.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Teachable and Gumroad promise simplicity, but they come with strings attached. Teachable locks you into subscriptions, and Gumroad caps your features unless you pay monthly. Both require PayPal or Stripe, which excludes creators in Nigeria and other restricted countries. On the flip side, crypto-native solutions like Unchained Commerce’s Admin Dashboard ($29.99) give you lifetime access with no subscriptions. You get transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics—all without needing a payment processor account. The tradeoff? You handle more setup, but you own your infrastructure. No platform can shut you down or change the rules mid-game. If you’re building a long-term business, this control is priceless.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Teachable and Gumroad don’t care about your location—until they do. Their payment processors (PayPal, Stripe) block transactions from restricted countries like Nigeria. Even if your buyer is in the US, your payout could fail if your account is flagged. Crypto-native solutions bypass this entirely. With NOWPayments integration, you accept 300+ coins from anywhere, no KYC required. Buyers don’t need accounts; they scan a QR code and pay. The system is global by design, not as an afterthought. If you’re in a restricted country, this isn’t just a feature—it’s your only option.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Teachable and Gumroad take their cut (5-10%) plus payment processor fees (2.9% + $0.30 per transaction). Payouts take 2-7 days, and you’re at their mercy if something goes wrong. Crypto payments settle in minutes, not days. Fees vary by coin, but you can choose low-cost networks like TRX or SOL. The real cost? Volatility. Prices fluctuate, but with live price feeds, you can adjust instantly. The tradeoff is clear: faster, cheaper payments with some risk vs. slower, higher fees with stability. If you’re in a restricted country, the choice is already made for you—crypto wins.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Teachable and Gumroad automate delivery, but only if their payment processors approve the transaction. Failures are common in restricted countries, leaving buyers frustrated and creators scrambling. Crypto-native systems automate delivery instantly upon payment confirmation. No middleman means no delays. Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine ($49.99) handles this seamlessly, sending PDF receipts and course access without you lifting a finger. The downside? You need to set up your own hosting. But once it’s done, it’s done. No platform can disrupt your sales or delivery pipeline.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you’re in Nigeria or another restricted country, Teachable and Gumroad aren’t options—they’re dead ends. Crypto-native infrastructure is your only path to selling globally. If you’re tech-averse, start small with the Admin Dashboard ($29.99) to manage transactions and orders. If you’re building a larger operation, the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) gives you everything plus priority support. The choice isn’t between platforms; it’s between selling your course or not selling it at all. Crypto isn’t just an alternative—it’s your permanent solution.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

If you’re in Nigeria and can’t use PayPal or Stripe, crypto-native infrastructure is your best—and only—option. Platforms like Teachable and Gumroad rely on these processors, which block transactions from restricted countries. Crypto bypasses these blocks entirely. With Unchained Commerce, you accept 300+ coins globally, no KYC required. Buyers pay instantly via QR code, and you get paid directly to your wallet. It’s more setup than traditional platforms, but you gain full control and global reach. If you’re serious about selling courses, this is the only way forward.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

Creators researching PayPal alternatives often discover that the real problem is not finding a single substitute — it is rebuilding the entire payment and delivery stack on infrastructure that does not inherit conventional payment system restrictions. The Core Shop Engine at $49.99 handles the backend piece: payment verification, automated delivery, and receipt generation. Web3 Wallet Connect at $19.99 handles the buyer-facing checkout. Together, they replace what Gumroad or Payhip was doing, but without any platform that can restrict your access. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes both components plus the Admin Dashboard and deployment guide. Visit the shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see the complete component breakdown.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
